sections.paragraph:
to describe a circle, to draw a circle, as with compasses. Job 26:10. (Syr. ܚܳܓ to go in a circle, ܚܘܽܓܬܐܳ a circle. Kindred roots are חָגַג and עוּג). Hence מְהוּגָה and-

חוג

m. a circle, sphere, used of the arch or vault of the sky, Pro 8:27 Job 22:14 of the world, Isa 40:22.
